Validation Focus: Calibration of r_PFBS; testing of r_carbon for carbon-negative designs; data-quality (r_calib) with long-term baseline data.
Key Formulas/Kernels to Test: M_x = ∫ (C_in − C_out) Q dt; η_x = E / M_x; corridor normalization for PFBS; r_calib ingest error score I = w_miss·N_miss + w_type·N_type + w_varid·N_varid + w_row·N_row.

Primary Pollutants/Metrics: E. coli (MPN/100 mL); Nutrients (N, P); TDS
Validation Focus: Calibration of r_E.coli and nutrient risk coordinates; testing of r_sigma for microbial sensors; cross-plane coupling between energy efficiency and water-quality risk.
Key Formulas/Kernels to Test: Hydrological decay and mixing models dC/dt = −kC + sources/sinks; corridor normalization for E. coli and nutrients; trust-adjusted impact kernels K_n,adj(x) = D_t·K_n(x) with D_t = 1 − r_calib.

Primary Pollutants/Metrics: Hydraulic Head; Flow Rate; Residence Time; Substrate Integrity
Validation Focus: Calibration of r_hydraulic and r_materials; stress-testing of safestep with synthetic hydraulic faults (e.g., surcharge); long-term material degradation modeling.
Key Formulas/Kernels to Test: CEIM kernels for hydraulics (M_x = ∫ (C_in − C_out) Q dt); first-order decay for substrates C(t) = C_0·e^(−k t) with t_90 = ln(10)/k; aggregation into r_materials and V_t = ∑_j w_j r_j^2 under safestep V_{t+1} ≤ V_t.
